_meta.title: BSV Browser - Browse, Pay, and Prove Who You Are
hero.title: Browse. Pay. Prove Who You Are.
hero.subtitle: A web browser with a wallet and identity built in
hero.description: BSV Browser turns every website into a potential storefront, login portal, or data vault. Pay fractions of a cent for content, sign in without passwords, and keep your keys on your device.
features.heading: One App, Three Superpowers
features.subtitle: Everything you need to browse, transact, and own your identity on the web.
feature.keys.title: Your Keys, Your Device
feature.keys.desc: Self-custodial from day one. Your wallet keys never leave your phone, protected by industry-standard encryption and strict access permissions.
feature.browse.title: Browse Any Website
feature.browse.desc: Use it like Chrome or Safari. When a site supports Web3, the browser handles payments and logins automatically — with your permission.
feature.signin.title: Sign In Without Passwords
feature.signin.desc: Prove who you are with cryptographic certificates. Share only what you choose — verify your age without revealing your birthday.
feature.pay.title: Pay Fractions of a Cent
feature.pay.desc: Micropayments unlock content, actions, and services that subscriptions and ads never could. Transactions settle in seconds.
feature.brc100.title: Works With Any BRC-100 App
feature.brc100.desc: Built on the open wallet standard. Any compliant app connects instantly — no vendor lock-in, no proprietary plugins.
feature.mobile.title: Built for Mobile
feature.mobile.desc: Tabs, bookmarks, history, search — every feature you expect from a browser, tuned for touch and available on iOS and Android.
screenshots.heading: See It In Action
screenshots.subtitle: Three things no other browser can do.
screenshot.setup.title: One-Tap Setup
screenshot.setup.desc: Create a wallet or import an existing one. You're browsing Web3 in under 7 seconds.
screenshot.identity.title: One Identity, Every App
screenshot.identity.desc: Your identity key works across all Web3 apps — no emails, no passwords, no forms.
screenshot.pay.title: Pay-Per-Action
screenshot.pay.desc: Authorize tiny payments for individual actions — a note saved, an article read, a vote cast.
tech.heading: Built for Developers, Too
tech.subtitle: Open source, standards-based, and ready for the apps you're building.
tech.item1: Full BRC-100 Wallet Interface — all 28 methods, any compliant app connects out of the box
tech.item2: AES-256-GCM encryption and ECDSA signatures for every wallet operation
tech.item3: Selective data revelation through identity certificates — users share only what they choose
tech.item4: SPV-native with BEEF transaction format for lightweight, scalable verification
tech.item5: Auditable key linkage proofs so privacy and accountability coexist
tech.item6: Named baskets give apps fine-grained control over transaction outputs and permissions
cta.heading: Try It Now — It's Free
cta.desc: Open source and self-custodial. Download BSV Browser and set up your wallet in under a minute.
